commit_message:
Minimize imports in an effort to lower simulation setup time Minimize imports in an effort to lower simulation setup time These changes represent a 21% reduction of execution time for the 460 test cases in hdl-modules repo: https://github.com/hdl-modules/hdl-modules For some small testbenches, the reduction is as much as 42%. Note that this repo contains only small to medium sized testbenches (1-10 seconds, with most around 1-4 seconds).

This is all using the GHDL simulator with GCC backend o

Note that this repo contains only small to medium sized testbenches (1-10 seconds, with most around 1-4 seconds).
